chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Const. Petition No. D- 104 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE DIRECTIONS 1.For orders on office objection –A 2.For orders on M.A No. 410/2025 (E/A) 3.For orders on maintainability of main case. 21.10.2025. None present for the petitioners nor any intimation is received. Same was the position on last date of hearing. On 06.02.2025, learned counsel for the petitioner was put on notice to satisfy the Court about maintainability of this petition. Since the petitioner remains unrepresented, consequently, this constitution petition is dismissed for non prosecution. Judge Judge Abid H. Qazi/**
